case_title: WESTERN PLYWOOD INC VS. PETERSON - MULLIN CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN PLYWOOD INC
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED MAR-14-2012 TO PETERSON-MULLIN CONSTRUCTION, "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,447.88 FILED BY WESTERN PLYWOOD INC AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSON - MULLIN CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN PLYWOOD INC AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSON - MULLIN CONSTRUCTION
COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN PLYWOOD INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $80.00 SERVED FEB-14-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSON - MULLIN CONSTRUCTION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESTERN PLYWOOD INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETERSON - MULLIN CONSTRUCTION $1,122.16 PRINCIPAL, $355.72 INTEREST, $117.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,595.38, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
